name: Ticket Response
description: General customer support ticket response template

name: FAQ Answer
description: Template for answering frequently asked questions
content:
Hi {{customer_name}},

Great question! Here's everything you need to know about {{topic}}:

{{answer_body}}

For more details, you can also check out our help article: {{help_article_url}}

If this doesn't fully answer your question, feel free to reply and I'll be happy to help further.

Best,
{{company}} Support Team

name: Escalation Notice
description: Template for communicating an escalation to a higher-tier team
content:
Hi {{customer_name}},

Thank you for your patience while we've been looking into your issue with {{issue_summary}}.

Given the complexity of your situation, I'm escalating this to our {{escalation_team}} team who have the specialised expertise to resolve this for you.

What happens next:
- Our {{escalation_team}} team will contact you within {{escalation_sla}}
- Your case reference is {{ticket_id}} — please keep this handy
- You can reach us at any time by replying to this message

We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

Warm regards,
{{agent_name}}
{{company}} Support

name: Frustrated Customer Response
description: Template for handling upset or frustrated customers with empathy
content:
Hi {{customer_name}},

I sincerely apologise for the experience you've had with {{issue_summary}}. I completely understand your frustration, and I want you to know that your concerns are completely valid.

This is not the experience we want for our customers, and I take full ownership of making this right for you.

Here is exactly what I am going to do:
{{resolution_steps}}

I will personally follow up with you by {{follow_up_time}} to confirm everything has been resolved to your satisfaction.

Again, I am truly sorry for the trouble this has caused. Thank you for giving us the opportunity to make this right.

Sincerely,
{{agent_name}}
{{company}} Customer Success
